positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a graceful leaping jaguar among stylized tropical foliage. The jaguar should be rendered in sharp, contrasting black lines and solid dark teal silhouettes, set against a vibrant yet muted pastel palette background (blush pink, sky blue, pale yellow). The design must feature clean, solid shapes with high contrast, emphasizing the jaguar's silhouette and powerful movement. The style should be modern vector art mixed with linework, suitable for direct apparel printing. Central composition, perfect symmetry, flat color blocking, highly detailed linework, sharp focus, studio lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, blurry, poor anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, low resolution, noisy, grainy, signature, text
